LocalStorageSync.title: Local Storage Sync Entity
LocalStorageSync.description: A single key-value pair representation of the offline-first LocalStorage synced to the cloud.

value.description: Serialized JSON value of the storage key

updatedAt.description: Last updated timestamp in ISO format

/users/{userId}/localStorageSync/{key}.description: Stores key-value pair backups of local storage to sync across devices for the authenticated user.
